faq_2_question: Is the app free to use?
faq_3_question: What information do I need to provide when registering?
faq_4_question: Can I edit my profile later?
faq_5_question: On which devices can I use the app?
faq_6_question: How does the AI friend work?
faq_7_question: Are my conversations with AI recorded?
faq_8_question: Can I choose my own AI character?
faq_9_question: Will the AI suggest matches with real people?
faq_10_question: Can my chats with the AI be seen by others?
faq_11_question: How can I delete my account?
faq_1_answer: Friendify is an AI-powered friendship app. It makes it easy for users to meet new_verb people while also offering an AI friend to chat with, get advice from, or talk to when they feel lonely.
faq_2_answer: You can use the application with its basic features for free. With a Premium membership, you can gain advantages such as additional chat features, unlimited messaging rights, and access to enhanced AI personalities.
faq_3_answer: Your email address, username, and date of birth are fundamentally required. To better personalize your profile, you can optionally add your interests and a short biography.
faq_4_answer: Yes. You can update your profile picture, biography, and interests anytime in the profile settings section.
faq_5_answer: Friendify is available on both iOS and Android devices. Furthermore, a web version will be available soon.
faq_6_answer: Our artificial intelligence provides personalized responses based on the information you give and your speaking style. Conversations progress naturally, fluently, and sincerely.
faq_7_answer: Your conversations may be stored in an anonymized manner to improve the user experience. According to our privacy policy, your personal data is not shared with third parties.
faq_8_answer: Yes. If you wish, you can personalize the chat experience by determining a name, character traits, or speaking style for the AI.
faq_9_answer: Yes. It can suggest user profiles that are suitable for you based on your interests and chat style.
faq_10_answer: No. AI chats are completely private and are not shared with other users.
faq_11_answer: In Profile → Account Settings → 'Delete My Account' option
